title: Zonama Sekotan fighter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the starfighter grown by [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]|the [[Sekotan Personal Starship]]}}
The '''Zonama Sekotan fighter''' was a three-lobed bioship armed with [[Yaret-Kor|lava cannons]] and propelled by a [[dovin basal]] that [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] grew for defense against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

The Zonama Sekotan fighter lacked a conventional [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. The vessel was also similar to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. Some of them were piloted by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilots, but most of them were capable of independent action or were piloted by Sekot itself.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
